rationale: No qualitative change affecting Poland this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved, Ukraine war continues at background level, and EU accession talks advance without a breakthrough.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran deal Sunday signing; Tehran disputes; Israel strikes Beirut
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty around Iran deal keeps energy price volatility elevated for Polish consumers. No resolution this cycle — same pattern as before.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: EU-Ukraine accession talks advancing is a long-term positive for Poland's eastern neighborhood stability, but no qualitative leap this cycle.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US government restricting access to leading AI models has minor indirect relevance to Polish tech and business users, but no direct policy impact on Poland.
